title: Planned Leave Application
summary: Employees should apply planned leave at least 3 working days in advance through Bloomie or the HR portal.
action: Raise a Leave / Attendance ticket if manager approval is pending

title: Unplanned Sick Leave
summary: Sick leave can be marked on the same day before shift start and supporting documents may be requested for absence longer than 2 days.
action: Ask Bloomie for process or raise a ticket for case-specific help

title: Payroll Timeline & Cutoff
summary: Payroll inputs freeze on the 25th of every month and approved changes after cutoff move to the next cycle.
action: Raise a Payroll ticket for employee-specific corrections

title: Reimbursement Claim Window
summary: Business reimbursements must be submitted with bills within 15 days from expense date.
action: Raise a Reimbursement / Payroll ticket with receipts attached

title: POSH Reporting Path
summary: Employees can report harassment or unsafe conduct confidentially and cases are routed only to authorized investigators.
action: Raise a POSH / Safety ticket for confidential handling

title: Referral Bonus Eligibility
summary: Referral bonus applies only after the referred candidate completes the probation period successfully.
action: Use Employee Referral flow or raise a Referral / Hiring ticket

title: Code of Conduct Basics
summary: Employees must avoid conflicts of interest
column8: Ask Bloomie for policy guidance or raise a confidential ticket

title: Work From Home Exceptions
summary: Hybrid and remote exceptions require manager approval plus HR confirmation for repeated or long-duration requests.
action: Raise a Workplace Flexibility ticket if approval is delayed

title: Joining Documentation
summary: All new joiners must submit identity
owner: and tax documents before final payroll activation.
column8: Raise an Onboarding ticket if your access or verification is blocked

title: Full & Final Settlement
summary: Full and final settlement starts after asset clearance and attendance closure are completed by all functions.
action: Raise an Exit / FNF ticket for delays or clarifications
